channel.title: git on Bokmark
channel.description: Recent content in git on Bokmark

item.title: 我的git配置
item.author: bokmark@163.com (bokmark)
item.description: # This is Git's per-user configuration file. [user] # Please adapt and uncomment the following lines: name = xxx email = xxx [filter "lfs"] clean = git-lfs clean -- %f smudge = git-lfs smudge -- %f process = git-lfs filter-process required = true [alias] co = checkout cp = cherry-pick cm = commit ba = branch -a bh = branch amend = commit -a --amend lg = log lo = log --oneline st = status df = diff review = !
